title: Automation based on person changing the status of a column
excerpt: I have a form that creates a board which is an change request. What I want is to create a notification that notifies someone only if a specific user changed the status column. This is to reduce the amount of unnecessary …

posts.author: HStothard (Helen Stothard)
posts.cookedHtml: I have a form that creates a board which is an change request. What I want is to create a notification that notifies someone only if a specific user changed the status column. This is to reduce the amount of unnecessary notifications they get. I cannot see anything that allows me to select specific user though in the options.

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@HStothard,

I don’t think that there is currently any way to do that with standard monday automations.

If this is important enough, you could create a simple scenario using Make or something similar that would do that.

Jim - The Monday Man
